ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code for the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the country belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "hdi_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country based on HDI value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., South Asia, Sub-Saharan Africa) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hdi_data" (
  "hdi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HDI record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the HDI data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the HDI data was recorded */,
  "hdi_value" REAL /* HDI value for the country */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy at birth */,
  "expected_years_of_schooling" REAL /* Expected years of schooling for children of school entrance age */,
  "mean_years_of_schooling" REAL /* Mean years of schooling for the adult population */,
  "gni_per_capita" REAL /* GNI per capita in 2017 PPP US$ */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hdi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hdi_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hdi_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the statistics pertain to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the statistics were calculated */,
  "average_hdi" REAL /* Average HDI value for the region */,
  "median_life_expectancy" REAL /* Median life expectancy within the region */,
  "average_gni" REAL /* Average GNI per capita in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hdi_statistics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "accessed_data" TEXT /* Description of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_log_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator (e.g., poverty rate, unemployment rate) */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the indicator was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_indicators_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., World Bank, UNDP) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hdi_data_sources" (
  "hdi_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the HDI data record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hdi_id", "source_id")
)
